sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: Atlético Madrid have shown mixed results in their last 5 matches with 2 wins, 1 draw, and 2 losses, but they are strong at home with recent convincing wins like 4-0 against Real Sociedad. Real Betis are unbeaten in their last 8 matches, though they've drawn 3 of their last 5, indicating solid but not dominant form.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two head-to-head matches, results are split with Real Betis winning 1-0 at home recently and Atlético Madrid winning 2-1 at home in their prior meeting. Atlético tend to dominate at home against Betis historically.

sections.subtitle: Team Strengths and Weaknesses
sections.text: Atlético Madrid boast a strong defense (2nd in least goals conceded) and high conversion of big chances (3rd in LaLiga), with players like Sørloth in form (5 goals in last 5). Real Betis have attacking flair with players like Antony (3 goals recently) but struggle with clean sheets, conceding in their last 9 matches.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics Impact
sections.text: Atlético's superior league position (3rd vs 6th), better defensive record, and home advantage suggest they have the edge. Their average of 4.86 corners per game and Betis' tendency for high-scoring games (6/7 over 2.5 goals) could influence the match dynamics.
